summary: Core routing and DEX functionality are operational, but build failure and API URL resolution inconsistencies pose deployment risks. ETF catalog (42 items) loads correctly, but code truncation in audit prevents full verification.

critical.why: npm run build exits with code -1, preventing production deployment
critical.fix: Investigate build logs, ensure all dependencies are properly installed and compatible

high.why: index.html and wasiApi.js have different URL resolution logic, potentially causing routing conflicts
high.fix: Consolidate API URL resolution into a single shared utility module

high.why: Critical component file appears incomplete, may affect order placement functionality
high.fix: Verify complete file is present and functional, especially order form handling

medium.why: ops/verify_wasi_with_ollama.mjs and src/dex/ directory are untracked, may contain important code
medium.fix: Review and add untracked files to version control if needed

medium.why: server/index.mjs appears incomplete in audit, may affect backend functionality
medium.fix: Verify complete server implementation is present and all endpoints are properly defined

low.why: withTests: false indicates no automated testing, increasing regression risk
low.fix: Implement unit and integration tests for critical paths

missing_features.expected: Error handling wrapper for DEX trading interface
missing_features.current: No error boundary visible in DexApp.jsx

next_actions: Add error boundaries to DEX app
